column1: # Ordered by hardware tier. This catalog is for MLX-capable Apple Silicon workflows, not Ollama.
# Recommendations are candidates only; the macOS profile script does not inspect installed MLX model files.
# The Qwen 3.5 9B entry below has passed a local MLX endpoint, Continue CLI read-tool, and disposable scoped-write smoke test on Apple Silicon. It is not editor-surface or language-matrix evidence.

High|mlx-community/Qwen3.5-9B-OptiQ-4bit|Use as the evidence-backed Apple Silicon MLX starting point before considering larger candidates that fit unified memory.|The bounded validation covers a local endpoint and Continue CLI generated-sample workflows only; validate any larger model and every intended surface independently.

Medium|mlx-community/Qwen3.5-9B-OptiQ-4bit|Validated as a Continue CLI read-tool and disposable scoped-write candidate on Apple Silicon through a local OpenAI-compatible MLX endpoint.|Use only with a current MLX runtime, bind the server to 127.0.0.1, and repeat surface-specific validation before relying on editor Agent mode.

Low|mlx-community/Qwen3.5-4B-4bit|Use for targeted read-only discovery and disposable one-file write smoke checks on constrained Apple Silicon machines.|The candidate passed a loopback endpoint structured-tool call plus Continue CLI read and disposable scoped-write checks; editor, plan, review, and full-matrix readiness are not claimed.
